title: King visits Scotland’s main RAF base and thanks families for their sacrifices

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: King visits Scotland’s main RAF base and thanks families for their sacrifices. Charles visited RAF Lossiemouth in Moray, northern Scotland, on Wednesday, to attend the stand-up parade for Number 42 (Torpedo Bomber)...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – King visits Scotland’s main RAF base and thanks families for their sacrifices
